title: Ukrainian Peppery Oat Hash
description: A hearty, savory dish that combines the flavors of Ukraine with a peppery kick. Perfect for a cold morning.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes and chopped onion. Drizzle with 1 tbsp butter and toss to coat.
Spread potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and golden brown.
While potatoes are roasting, cook Ukrainian sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in hash browns and cook until heated through.
In a separate bowl, mix together oats and a pinch of salt.
Add cooked sausage mixture to the bowl with oats and stir to combine.
To assemble the dish, place a scoop of roasted potatoes on a plate, top with a spoonful of sausage and oat mixture, and garnish with chopped fresh herbs (if desired).
Note: Cooking time may vary depending on the size and number of servings.
